commands: '--- who calls pdfnode: pdfreport4 PDF keys ---'

Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,8080,8081,9000,9090,5000 } | ForEach-Object { "$($_.LocalAddress):$($_.LocalPort) pid=$($_.OwningProcess) $((Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).ProcessName)" }
